tags.name: Driver/Auto Order
tags.description:
# Driver Auto-Delivery API Documentation

This document describes the API endpoints exposed specifically for **Drivers** to view and manage **Auto Delivery Batches**. All endpoints are prefixed with the base API URL (e.g., `/api/v1`).

---

## Authentication Header
All driver API requests must include the driver JWT authentication token in the `Authorization` header:

```http
Authorization: Bearer <DRIVER_JWT_TOKEN>
```

---

## 1. Get Active Assigned Batches

Retrieve all active auto-delivery batches assigned to the authenticated driver. Active batches are those with status `ASSIGNED` or `DELIVERED`.

* **Method**: `GET`
* **Path**: `/driver/auto-deliveries`
* **Response Status**: `200 OK`

### Response Body Example
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "e0e227a9-5110-4bf6-9ff3-75b2de66c6b3",
      "batchNumber": "BAT-50000001",
      "productId": "7cf73b5f-a6bd-4e94-8ab3-db1c52eb4194",
      "product": {
        "id": "7cf73b5f-a6bd-4e94-8ab3-db1c52eb4194",
        "name": "Water Carton 40 Bottles",
        "nameAr": "كرتون مياه ٤٠ حبة",
        "image": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/rahiq-bucket/products/water-carton.png"
      },
      "quantity": 10,
      "status": "ASSIGNED",
      "assignedAt": "2026-06-14T13:25:00.000Z",
      "deliveredAt": null,
      "orderCount": 42
    }
  ]
}
```

### Data Fields Reference
| Field | Type | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `id` | `string (uuid)` | The unique ID of the batch. |
| `batchNumber` | `string` | The serial batch sequence identifier (prefixed with `BAT-`). |
| `productId` | `string (uuid)` | The ID of the matching product. |
| `product.name` | `string` | The product's English name. |
| `product.nameAr` | `string` | The product's Arabic name. |
| `product.image` | `string \| null` | Fully qualified public URL to the product image. |
| `quantity` | `number` | The requested product quantity filter for this batch. |
| `status` | `string` | The status of the batch (`ASSIGNED` or `DELIVERED`). |
| `assignedAt` | `string (date)` | ISO timestamp of when the driver was assigned. |
| `deliveredAt` | `string (date)` | ISO timestamp of when the delivery was confirmed (null if pending). |
| `orderCount` | `number` | Total number of suborders contained in this batch. |

---

## 2. Confirm Batch Delivery (Submit Proofs)

Allows a driver to submit delivery proof files (images & optional video) to complete the auto-delivery batch. 
Submitting this request shifts the status of the batch and all of its associated suborders to `DELIVERED`.

* **Method**: `POST`
* **Path**: `/driver/auto-deliveries/:id/confirm`
* **Content-Type**: `multipart/form-data`
* **Response Status**: `200 OK`

### Path Parameters
* `id` (string, required): The UUID of the batch to confirm.

### Request Body (Multipart Form-Data)
| Field Key | Type | Required | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `mosqueFrontImage` | File (Image) | **Yes** | Photo showing the front facade of the mosque. |
| `mosqueInsideImage` | File (Image) | **Yes** | Photo showing the interior of the mosque where cartons are placed. |
| `packagesImage` | File (Image) | **Yes** | Photo showing the delivered packages / cartons. |
| `deliveryVideo` | File (Video) | No | Short video clip documenting the delivery process. |

### Response Body Example
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Batch delivery confirmed successfully",
  "data": {
    "success": true,
    "batchNumber": "BAT-50000001",
    "status": "DELIVERED"
  }
}
```

---

## Error Responses

### Missing/Invalid Proofs (`400 Bad Request`)
If any of the three mandatory images (`mosqueFrontImage`, `mosqueInsideImage`, `packagesImage`) are missing from the request:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Delivery proof requires Mosque Front Image, Inside Image, and Packages Image"
}
```

### Batch Already Confirmed (`400 Bad Request`)
If the batch is in `CONFIRMED` or `CREATED` status and cannot accept delivery proofs:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Batch must be in assigned status to confirm delivery."
}
```

### Unauthorized Access (`403 Forbidden`)
If a driver attempts to confirm a batch assigned to a different driver:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "You are not authorized to deliver this batch."
}
```

### Batch Not Found (`404 Not Found`)
If the batch ID in the URL does not exist:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Batch not found."
}
```
